nl_query: What percentage of revaluation requests result in a new attempt being created?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(rr.id) AS revaluation_to_attempt_percentage
FROM revaluation_request rr
JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id
WHERE ea.is_active = TRUE
